---
title: "試合一覧"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

```{r setup}
source("common_site.R", local = TRUE)

year_start_default <- sprintf("%d-01-01", current_year)
year_end_default <- sprintf("%d-12-31", current_year)

games_page_data <- games_display |>
  transmute(
    date = format(gamedate, "%Y-%m-%d"),
    date_label,
    season,
    gametype,
    team1,
    team1_name,
    team1_url,
    team1_color,
    team2,
    team2_name,
    team2_url,
    team2_color,
    score_label,
    rating_move_label
  )

games_page_json <- toJSON(games_page_data, dataframe = "rows", auto_unbox = TRUE)
```

::: {.minimal-hero}
<div class="minimal-kicker">GAMES</div>
<h1 class="minimal-title">GAME INDEX</h1>
<div class="hero-meta-strip">
  <span>DEFAULT `r current_year`</span>
  <span>TOTAL `r nrow(games_display)`</span>
</div>
:::

```{r games-controls}
div(
  class = "browser-controls browser-controls-wide",
  div(
    class = "control-block",
    tags$label(`for` = "games-team-filter", class = "control-label", "UNIVERSITY"),
    tags$select(
      id = "games-team-filter",
      class = "control-input control-multi",
      multiple = "multiple",
      lapply(seq_len(nrow(current_team_table)), function(i) {
        row <- current_team_table[i, ]
        tags$option(value = row$team, row$TeamName)
      })
    )
  ),
  div(
    class = "control-block",
    tags$label(`for` = "games-type-filter", class = "control-label", "TYPE"),
    tags$select(
      id = "games-type-filter",
      class = "control-input control-multi",
      multiple = "multiple",
      lapply(sort(unique(games_display$gametype)), function(type_name) {
        tags$option(value = type_name, type_name)
      })
    )
  ),
  div(
    class = "control-block control-block-year",
    tags$label(`for` = "games-date-start", class = "control-label", "FROM"),
    tags$input(
      id = "games-date-start",
      class = "control-input",
      type = "date",
      value = year_start_default
    )
  ),
  div(
    class = "control-block control-block-year",
    tags$label(`for` = "games-date-end", class = "control-label", "TO"),
    tags$input(
      id = "games-date-end",
      class = "control-input",
      type = "date",
      value = year_end_default
    )
  )
)
```

<div id="games-page-count" class="table-count"></div>
<div id="games-page-table"></div>

```{r games-script}
games_script <- paste0(
  "(function(){",
  "const rows = ", games_page_json, ";",
  "const teamSelect = document.getElementById('games-team-filter');",
  "const typeSelect = document.getElementById('games-type-filter');",
  "const startInput = document.getElementById('games-date-start');",
  "const endInput = document.getElementById('games-date-end');",
  "const count = document.getElementById('games-page-count');",
  "const target = document.getElementById('games-page-table');",
  "if (!teamSelect || !typeSelect || !startInput || !endInput || !count || !target) { return; }",
  "function esc(v){ return String(v ?? '').replace(/[&<>\\\"']/g, function(ch){ return ({'&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','\\\"':'&quot;',\"'\":'&#39;'})[ch]; }); }",
  "function selectedValues(node){ return Array.from(node.selectedOptions).map(function(opt){ return opt.value; }); }",
  "function filterRows(){",
  "  const teams = selectedValues(teamSelect);",
  "  const types = selectedValues(typeSelect);",
  "  const startDate = startInput.value || '0000-01-01';",
  "  const endDate = endInput.value || '9999-12-31';",
  "  return rows.filter(function(row){",
  "    const teamOk = !teams.length || teams.indexOf(row.team1) >= 0 || teams.indexOf(row.team2) >= 0;",
  "    const typeOk = !types.length || types.indexOf(row.gametype) >= 0;",
  "    const dateOk = row.date >= startDate && row.date <= endDate;",
  "    return teamOk && typeOk && dateOk;",
  "  });",
  "}",
  "function render(){",
  "  const filtered = filterRows();",
  "  count.textContent = filtered.length + ' games';",
  "  if (!filtered.length) {",
  "    target.innerHTML = '<div class=\"empty-state\">NO GAMES</div>';",
  "    return;",
  "  }",
  "  const body = filtered.map(function(row){",
  "    return '<tr>' +",
  "      '<td>' + esc(row.date_label) + '</td>' +",
  "      '<td>' + esc(row.season) + '</td>' +",
  "      '<td>' + esc(row.gametype) + '</td>' +",
  "      '<td class=\"matchup-col\"><a href=\"' + esc(row.team1_url) + '\" style=\"color:' + esc(row.team1_color) + '\" class=\"team-link-inline\">' + esc(row.team1_name) + '</a><span class=\"score-inline\">' + esc(row.score_label) + '</span><a href=\"' + esc(row.team2_url) + '\" style=\"color:' + esc(row.team2_color) + '\" class=\"team-link-inline\">' + esc(row.team2_name) + '</a></td>' +",
  "      '<td>' + esc(row.rating_move_label) + '</td>' +",
  "    '</tr>';",
  "  }).join('');",
  "  target.innerHTML = '<div class=\"table-shell compact-table-shell\"><table class=\"compact-data-table\"><thead><tr><th>DATE</th><th>SEASON</th><th>TYPE</th><th>MATCHUP</th><th>RATING MOVE</th></tr></thead><tbody>' + body + '</tbody></table></div>';",
  "}",
  "[teamSelect, typeSelect, startInput, endInput].forEach(function(node){ node.addEventListener('change', render); });",
  "render();",
  "})();"
)

tags$script(HTML(games_script))
```
